name: PC Deals Weekly Update: December 22, 2002
description: Good news and bad news this week, PC shoppers. The good news is that Dell has partially reduced its recent price hikes, although we're far from returning to Dell's best deals before Thanksgiving; the bad news is that there are a pitiful number of retail deals. PC Deals expects mid-week flyers to appear in the paper advertising the beginning of post-Christmas sales.
